key_points: Mean is a measure of central tendency used to represent the average value of data
Median divides an ordered dataset into two equal halves
Dot plots visually represent frequency of values in a dataset
Line graphs help identify trends and patterns over time
Organizing data helps in easier interpretation and analysis
examples: Dot plot representing marks obtained by students
Line graph showing rainfall during different months
formulas: Mean = (Sum of all observations) / (Number of observations)
Median (odd data set) = Middle value after arranging data
Median (even data set) = Average of two middle values
exam_tips: Always arrange numbers in ascending order before finding median
Check calculation carefully while finding mean
Use correct scales when plotting graphs
Label axes properly in line graphs
